response.justification: A versatile, senior-level polyglot engineer with 15+ years across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems, plus relevant high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems experience and strong software-craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based). However, the resume shows essentially no direct experience with the core domain of this role: experimentation frameworks, feature flagging, telemetry/metrics platforms, or statistical/data analysis. Principal/IC6-level cross-team architectural leadership is also only weakly evidenced. A solid engineer, but a domain mismatch against the role's defining requirements.
strengths: Broad polyglot depth (C, C++, C#, Java, JS/TS, DLang) exceeding the 8+ year experience bar
Proven high-throughput, low-latency distributed/microservices experience at scale
Strong engineering fundamentals: TDD, CI/CD, code quality, testing tooling
concerns: No demonstrated experimentation, A/B testing, or feature-flagging platform experience
Lacks telemetry/metrics infrastructure and statistical/data-analysis background
Limited evidence of Principal-level cross-team, multi-workstream leadership at enterprise scale
